natural_language:
You have 6 rooms, 2 balls, and 2 grippers. All the balls are in the first room, and the grippers are free. The robby is in the first room.
Your goal is to drop all the balls held by grippers in an empty room that the robby didn't start in, and pick up the balls that started in rooms not held by the robby.
selected_pddl:
(define (problem gripper-task)
  (:domain gripper)
  (:requirements :strips :typing)
  (:objects
    rooma roomb roomc roomd roome roomf - room
    ball1 ball2 - ball
    left right - gripper
  )
  (:init
    (at-robby rooma)
    (at ball1 rooma)
    (at ball2 rooma)
    (free left)
    (free right)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (at ball1 roomb)
      (at ball2 roomb)
    )
  )
)
selected_planner_error: Planning failed: list index out of range

natural_language:
You have 2 rooms.
You have 3 balls.
You have 2 grippers.
Gripper gripper1 is carrying ball1.
Gripper gripper2 is carrying ball2.
ball3 is at room1.
Your goal is to have the following:
Gripper gripper1 should be carrying ball2.
Gripper gripper2 should be carrying ball1.
ball3 should be at room1.
selected_pddl:
(define (problem gripper-task)
  (:domain gripper)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects
    room1 room2 - room
    ball1 ball2 ball3 - ball
    gripper1 gripper2 - gripper
  )
  (:init
    (at-robby room1)
    (carry ball1 gripper1)
    (carry ball2 gripper2)
    (at ball3 room1)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (carry ball2 gripper1)
      (carry ball1 gripper2)
      (at ball3 room1)
    )
  )
)
selected_planner_error: Planning failed: list index out of range
